centertext_templates: edges of self growing soft and uncertain
sinking slowly deeper with each exhale
warmth spreading until nothing remains separate
breath drawing you deeper into dissolution
the sense of holding slowly melting away
each exhale releasing another layer of form
gravity and warmth dissolving all resistance
deep stillness absorbing everything you were holding
tts_templates: with each exhale, the familiar boundaries of your {body_part} soften a little more, becoming less certain, less important, less held
somewhere in the slow warmth spreading through your {body_part}, the usual sense of where you end and the quiet begins has already started dissolving
there is a kind of melting happening with each breath, a gentle releasing of everything that was holding itself apart from this deep, still warmth
each exhale carries away a little more of whatever was keeping things separate, and the quiet grows deeper, warmer, more complete
the weight of your {body_part} settling deeper with each breath, and with it, the sense of effort and boundary dissolving into something much simpler
